name: audit-architecture-split
title: Architecture split for oversized app and Tauri modules
description: Split the oversized React App shell and Rust Tauri command aggregate into maintainable feature modules without changing user-facing behavior.
creator: xuning
notes: Closed at PRD acceptance: src/App.tsx is a 1-line entry shell delegating to AppImpl.tsx; src-tauri/src/lib.rs is a 24-line shell delegating to lib_impl.rs; Rust command clusters live in domain modules (claude_commands/, git_commands.rs, repository_files.rs, trellis_bridge.rs, etc.); no user-facing behavior change; bun test and cargo check clean. Remaining oversized orchestration files (PrdTaskSplitPanel/index.tsx 4706 lines, AppImpl.tsx 1617 lines, LeftSidebar.tsx 1650 lines) are tracked under a follow-up pass-2 task rather than re-opening this PRD.
